#+TITLE: Footnote Edge Cases

* References and definitions

Text with a footnote reference [fn:1].

Text with multiple references [fn:1] and [fn:2] and [fn:3].

[fn:1] First footnote definition.

[fn:2] Second footnote definition.

* Orphaned definition (no reference)

[fn:unused] This footnote is defined but never referenced.

* Orphaned reference (no definition)

Text with reference to [fn:nonexistent] which has no definition.

* Inline footnotes

Text with inline footnote [fn:inline:This is the definition inline].

Text with another inline [fn::anonymous inline footnote].

* Multiple references to same footnote

First reference [fn:shared].
Second reference [fn:shared].
Third reference [fn:shared].

[fn:shared] Shared definition.

* Footnote-like text in code blocks

#+BEGIN_SRC org
[fn:not-a-ref] This is inside a code block.
Text [fn:also-not] a reference.
#+END_SRC

* Named footnote labels

[fn:descriptive-name] A footnote with a descriptive label.

Reference to [fn:descriptive-name].

* Footnote at very end of file
[fn:3] Third footnote, at end of file.
